tasks.subject: [settings-reset-restart] [P3] Wire Advanced tab and overlay into SettingsDialog
tasks.description:
## Overview

Modify the existing SettingsDialog to add the "Advanced" tab and manage the ServerRestartOverlay state. This is the integration task that connects all the components created in previous tasks.

File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/SettingsDialog.tsx`

## Step 1: Modify SettingsDialog.tsx

Make the following changes to `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/SettingsDialog.tsx`:

### Add imports

Add to the existing imports:
```typescript
import { AdvancedTab } from './AdvancedTab';
import { ServerRestartOverlay } from './ServerRestartOverlay';
```

### Add state for restart overlay

Inside the `SettingsDialog` function body, add:
```typescript
const [restartOverlayOpen, setRestartOverlayOpen] = useState(false);
```

### Change TabsList grid columns

Change `grid-cols-4` to `grid-cols-5` in the TabsList:
```tsx
<TabsList
  className="mx-4 mt-3 grid w-full grid-cols-5"
  style={{ width: 'calc(100% - 2rem)' }}
>
  <TabsTrigger value="appearance">Appearance</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="preferences">Preferences</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="statusBar">Status Bar</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="server">Server</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="advanced">Advanced</TabsTrigger>
</TabsList>
```

### Add Advanced TabsContent

After the `server` TabsContent, add:
```tsx
<TabsContent value="advanced" className="mt-0">
  <AdvancedTab
    onResetComplete={() => setRestartOverlayOpen(true)}
    onRestartComplete={() => setRestartOverlayOpen(true)}
  />
</TabsContent>
```

### Add ServerRestartOverlay

After the `TunnelDialog` (just before the closing `</ResponsiveDialog>` tag), add:
```tsx
<ServerRestartOverlay
  open={restartOverlayOpen}
  onDismiss={() => setRestartOverlayOpen(false)}
/>
```

## Step 2: Verify the complete modified structure

The final SettingsDialog should have:
1. Five tabs: Appearance, Preferences, Status Bar, Server, Advanced
2. The Advanced tab renders `<AdvancedTab />` with callbacks that open the restart overlay
3. `<ServerRestartOverlay />` is rendered alongside the dialog, controlled by `restartOverlayOpen` state

## Step 3: Manual integration testing checklist

Verify the following scenarios work end-to-end:
- [ ] Settings dialog opens with 5 tabs visible
- [ ] Advanced tab shows Danger Zone with Reset and Restart buttons
- [ ] Clicking Reset opens ResetDialog, requires typing "reset" to enable submit
- [ ] After successful reset, localStorage is cleared and restart overlay appears
- [ ] Clicking Restart opens RestartDialog with simple confirmation
- [ ] After successful restart, restart overlay appears
- [ ] Overlay shows loading spinner, polls health, reloads page when server returns
- [ ] Overlay shows error after 30s timeout, Try Again resumes polling, Dismiss closes

## Acceptance Criteria

1. SettingsDialog has 5 tabs with "Advanced" as the fifth tab
2. TabsList uses `grid-cols-5` layout
3. Advanced tab renders `<AdvancedTab />` with correct callbacks
4. Both `onResetComplete` and `onRestartComplete` open the ServerRestartOverlay
5. ServerRestartOverlay can be dismissed, which resets the state
6. TunnelDialog and ServerRestartOverlay both render correctly without conflicts
7. `pnpm typecheck` passes
8. `pnpm lint` passes
tasks.activeForm: Wiring Advanced tab and restart overlay into SettingsDialog
